Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6182 "AQUANAUT-7D00-6182" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7d00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Aquanaut.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $7D00 which sets $286 to $09 so that text in the game displays correctly.
Also made the following changes to allow the fire button in port 2 start the game with 9 lives (with the original code you must press 3-9 to choose the number of starting lives):
1. Patched the JSR $FFE4 instruction at $6206 to be JSR $7B00 instead 2. Added a small routine at $7B00 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets the accumulator to $39 and returns, which causes the game to start just as if 9 was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then JMPs to $FFE4 to carry on the normal code flow.
